best_bet.reason: The warmest water of the three counties paired with 1 to 3 foot surf and those light southwest winds make it the sweet spot for swimmers and waders who want the most comfortable conditions.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
